calendar.matters:
Petitioners Charles Schwab & Co., Inc. And Kimon Daifotis' Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jan-14-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: IAN ROSS, ESQ., 415.398.6000, FOR PETITIONERS CHARLES SCHWAB & CO, INC. AND KIMON DAIFOTIS; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Petitioners Charles Schwab & Co., Inc. And Kimon Daifotis' Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award is Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Confirm Arb Award
Off Calendar Jan-10-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling re: PETITIONERS CHARLES SCHWAB & CO., INC. AND KIMON DAIFOTIS' Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award.
Judge Miller recuses herself. Per order of the Presiding Judge, the motion is continued to January 14, 2014, to be heard by Judge Busch at 9:30 a.m. in this department. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185
